name: minio
title: MinIO Object Storage
description: MinIO high-performance S3-compatible object storage server

variables.name: API_PORT
variables.label: API Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the MinIO S3-compatible API

variables.name: CONSOLE_PORT
variables.label: Console Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the MinIO web console

variables.name: ROOT_USER
variables.label: Root User
variables.description: Root access key for MinIO (minimum 3 characters)

variables.name: ROOT_PASSWORD
variables.label: Root Password
variables.description: Root secret key for MinIO (minimum 8 characters)
